title: Fix embed.js build failure — localEmbed import does not exist in agentic-embed
description:
BUILD IS BROKEN. src/runtime/embed.js calls localEmbed(text) with a bare string, but agentic-embed localEmbed() expects an array of texts (see node_modules/agentic-embed/agentic-embed.js:154). Also the default import + destructure pattern works but the function call is wrong.

Test failures from test/m98-embed-build-fix.test.js:
1. expects localEmbed([...]) — array argument, not bare string
2. expects const [result] = ... — destructure array result
3. expects NOT agenticEmbed(text) — no bare string call

Fix needed in src/runtime/embed.js:
- Change `return agenticEmbed(text)` to `const [embedding] = agenticEmbed([text]); return embedding`
- The localEmbed function signature is: localEmbed(texts, vocabSize=512) where texts is an array
- It returns an array of embeddings, one per input text

This is P0 — the package cannot be required until this is fixed.
